name: Link Reservations Inc.
summary: Link Reservations Inc., through its subsidiary, produces cannabidiol-based (CBD) products primarily for pets in Europe and the United States. It develops and markets hemp-based CBD products for cats, dogs, and horses. The company was formerly known as Vendum Batteries, Inc. and changed its name to Link Reservations Inc. in May 2015. Link Reservations Inc. was incorporated in 2006 and is based in Kington, the United Kingdom.
